notes: Adds stronger Pathmark favicon and PWA icon metadata for the browser tab, shortcuts and Google OAuth callback reloads.
Adds root static icon files served through Streamlit's static file path, including favicon.ico and 16/32/192/512 PNG icons.
Documents that Google's own account chooser and consent screens use Google Cloud OAuth branding, not Streamlit page metadata.
Adds Google Cloud branding guidance to About & Privacy and developer OAuth diagnostics.
release: v0.6.34 Pathmark logo and OAuth branding refinement
release_name: Pathmark logo and OAuth branding refinement
release_notes: Adds stronger Pathmark browser-tab/PWA icon metadata and documents the Google Cloud OAuth branding step needed for Google sign-in screens to show the Pathmark logo.
label: Pathmark logo and OAuth branding refinement
